parts.text: {"name":"Classic Tomato Soup","recipeIngredient":["3 lbs ripe tomatoes","1 yellow onion","4 cloves garlic","3 tbsp olive oil","2 cups vegetable broth","1/2 cup heavy cream"],"recipeInstructions":["Preheat oven to 400F.","Roast tomatoes with onion and garlic.","Blend with broth until smooth.","Stir in cream and reheat."],"prepTime":"PT10M","cookTime":"PT35M","recipeYield":"4 servings"}
